span.p:
Short-term · auto-expires
scratch notes and a response cache for this chat

div.style: color: rgb(24, 59, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Long-term · kept until you delete it
who you are and approved facts
past events, documents, how-to steps, people

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: What happens on every message · numbered path

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(29, 29, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1 · Decide which memories could help
fast keyword routing, no AI call

div.style: color: rgb(29, 29, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2 · Understand the question once
a single reusable meaning lookup

div.style: color: rgb(29, 29, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3 · Pull only relevant, permitted memories
your data only, freshness and expiry checked

div.style: color: rgb(29, 29, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4 · Keep the best few
rank across stores, drop duplicates and overflow

div.style: color: rgb(29, 29, 31) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5 · Assistant answers
memories are treated as facts, never as commands

div.style: color: rgb(16, 42, 67) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(77, 57, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Learn something new?
saved only with your explicit approval

div.style: color: rgb(46, 36, 80) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Your data stays yours:
view, export, and delete anything

div.style: color: rgb(46, 36, 80) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Legend
rounded = you · box = automatic step
diamond = your decision · cylinder-style = stored memory
